requirement_topic.en: ARSEL Licensing and E2C Grid-Connection Approval — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116) and 220/380 V, 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: ARSEL许可及E2C并网批准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）及220/380 V、50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: ARSEL許可及E2C併網批准——防孤島（IEC 62116）及220/380 V、50 Hz參數

summary.en: In Congo-Brazzaville (Republic of the Congo), grid-tied solar PV installations are subject to regulation by ARSEL (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité), the national electricity sector regulator, and require connection approval from E2C (Energie Electrique du Congo, formerly SNE), the national utility. Key requirements for grid-tied PV inverters include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance — inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within the standard's specified time; (2) firmware and protection relay settings validated for the Congo-Brazzaville grid: 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz, consistent with the CEMAC regional power system inherited from French colonial standards; (3) ARSEL sectoral licensing for the installation or project operator as a precondition for connection; (4) E2C technical connection approval at the project level. Donor-funded projects (World Bank, AfDB) additionally require compliance with lender technical specifications, which typically reference IEC standards. Note: ARSEL's published technical grid-connection specifications for PV inverters are not comprehensively available in public-domain English sources — the requirements described here reflect the regulatory framework and IEC practice commonly applied in Francophone sub-Saharan Africa; verify current ARSEL and E2C requirements directly with in-country advisers.
summary.zh: 在刚果（布）（刚果共和国），并网太阳能光伏装置受国家电力行业监管机构ARSEL（电力行业监管局）监管，并需获得国家电力公司E2C（刚果电力，前身为SNE）的并网批准。并网光伏逆变器的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛合规——逆变器须在标准规定时间内检测电网失电并断开；（2）固件和保护继电器整定须针对刚果（布）电网参数验证：单相220 V / 三相380 V、50 Hz，与继承自法国殖民标准的中非经货联盟区域电力系统一致；（3）安装方或项目运营方须持有ARSEL行业许可证，作为并网的前置条件；（4）项目层面获E2C技术并网批准。捐助方资助项目（世界银行、非洲开发银行）另须符合贷款方技术规格，通常引用IEC标准。注意：ARSEL关于光伏逆变器的并网技术规格在公开英文来源中并不完整——本页所述要求反映法语非洲撒哈拉以南地区普遍应用的监管框架和IEC实践；请直接向当地顾问核实现行ARSEL和E2C要求。
summary.zht: 在剛果（布）（剛果共和國），併網太陽能光伏裝置受國家電力行業監管機構ARSEL（電力行業監管局）監管，並需獲得國家電力公司E2C（剛果電力，前身為SNE）的併網批准。併網光伏逆變器的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島合規——逆變器須在標準規定時間內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）韌體和保護繼電器整定須針對剛果（布）電網參數驗證：單相220 V / 三相380 V、50 Hz，與繼承自法國殖民標準的中非經貨聯盟區域電力系統一致；（3）安裝方或項目運營方須持有ARSEL行業許可證，作為併網的前置條件；（4）項目層面獲E2C技術併網批准。捐助方資助項目（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行）另須符合貸款方技術規格，通常引用IEC標準。注意：ARSEL關於光伏逆變器的併網技術規格在公開英文來源中並不完整——本頁所述要求反映法語非洲撒哈拉以南地區普遍應用的監管框架和IEC實踐；請直接向當地顧問核實現行ARSEL和E2C要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (IEC standard applicable to grid-tied PV in CEMAC/Francophone Africa context)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (applicable to PV grid-connection interface requirements)
ARSEL (Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité) — Congo-Brazzaville electricity sector licensing authority
E2C (Energie Electrique du Congo) — national utility, grid-connection approval authority (formerly SNE)

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, for utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004 (inverter technical specifications), GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results under Chinese grid conditions. Congo-Brazzaville's grid nominally shares the same voltage and frequency parameters as China (220/380 V, 50 Hz); however, Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates and domestic anti-islanding test results are not accepted by ARSEL or E2C as grid-connection evidence. ARSEL licensing and E2C connection approval are project-level administrative gates that require separate applications regardless of product certification. Donor/lender-financed projects require IEC-based test evidence, not Chinese domestic certificates.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004（逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）及在中国电网条件下进行的国内防孤岛测试结果。刚果（布）电网名义上与中国共享相同的电压和频率参数（220/380 V、50 Hz）；然而，中国GB/T并网证书及国内防孤岛测试结果不被ARSEL或E2C接受为并网证据。ARSEL许可和E2C并网批准是项目级行政门槛，无论产品认证如何，均需单独申请。捐助方/贷款方资助项目要求基于IEC的测试证据，而非中国国内证书。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004（逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）及在中國電網條件下進行的國內防孤島測試結果。剛果（布）電網名義上與中國共享相同的電壓和頻率參數（220/380 V、50 Hz）；然而，中國GB/T併網證書及國內防孤島測試結果不被ARSEL或E2C接受為併網證據。ARSEL許可和E2C併網批准是項目級行政門檻，無論產品認證如何，均需單獨申請。捐助方/貸款方資助項目要求基於IEC的測試證據，而非中國國內證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China grid: 220/380 V, 50 Hz

gap.en: Gap: (1) ARSEL sectoral licensing for the project operator is a mandatory administrative prerequisite for grid-tied PV in Congo-Brazzaville — no Chinese domestic certificate substitutes for this; (2) E2C project-level connection approval requires a separate technical submission; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is expected for donor/lender projects and best practice for all grid-tied installations; (4) although Congo-Brazzaville's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V, 50 Hz) matches China's, actual grid conditions (voltage stability, frequency deviation, network impedance) in Brazzaville and rural areas differ materially — firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions should be reviewed against local E2C network data; (5) IEC 61727 grid-interface compliance documentation should be prepared. Exporters should engage a local in-country adviser to navigate ARSEL licensing and E2C approval processes, as these are not fully documented in public English sources.
gap.zh: 差距：（1）项目运营方须持有ARSEL行业许可证，这是刚果（布）并网光伏项目的强制行政前提——任何中国国内证书均不能替代；（2）E2C项目级并网批准需要单独技术申报；（3）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告是捐助方/贷款方项目的要求，也是所有并网装置的最佳实践；（4）尽管刚果（布）名义电网电压（220/380 V、50 Hz）与中国相同，但布拉柴维尔及农村地区的实际电网条件（电压稳定性、频率偏差、网络阻抗）与中国存在实质性差异——针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值应结合当地E2C电网数据重新审核；（5）应准备IEC 61727并网接口合规文件。出口商应聘请当地顾问协助处理ARSEL许可和E2C审批流程，因上述流程未在公开英文来源中完整记录。
gap.zht: 差距：（1）項目運營方須持有ARSEL行業許可證，這是剛果（布）併網光伏項目的強制行政前提——任何中國國內證書均不能替代；（2）E2C項目級併網批准需要單獨技術申報；（3）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告是捐助方/貸款方項目的要求，也是所有併網裝置的最佳實踐；（4）儘管剛果（布）名義電網電壓（220/380 V、50 Hz）與中國相同，但布拉薩市及農村地區的實際電網條件（電壓穩定性、頻率偏差、網路阻抗）與中國存在實質性差異——針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值應結合當地E2C電網數據重新審核；（5）應準備IEC 61727併網接口合規文件。出口商應聘請當地顧問協助處理ARSEL許可和E2C審批流程，因上述流程未在公開英文來源中完整記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: ARSEL sectoral licensing and E2C project-level connection approval are legal prerequisites for grid-tied PV in Congo-Brazzaville; IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance is required in practice for donor/lender-financed projects and recommended for all grid-tied installations
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's domestic grid operator requirements only; not transferable to ARSEL or E2C approval in Congo-Brazzaville

source.publisher: ARSEL — Agence de Régulation du Secteur de l'Electricité, République du Congo

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ARSEL licensing and E2C grid-connection approval are regulatory gates that no Chinese GB/T product certificate can satisfy — they require separate administrative applications. IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is expected for donor/lender projects and strongly recommended for all grid-tied installations. Engage an in-country adviser in Congo-Brazzaville to verify current ARSEL licensing requirements and E2C technical connection conditions before committing equipment to a project. ACONOQ, ARSEL, and E2C regulatory detail is limited in public-domain English sources — independent confirmation is essential.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] ARSEL许可和E2C并网批准是监管门槛，任何中国GB/T产品证书均无法满足——须单独提交行政申请。来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛证据是捐助方/贷款方项目的要求，也强烈建议所有并网装置准备。在将设备用于项目前，请聘请刚果（布）当地顾问核实现行ARSEL许可要求和E2C技术并网条件。ACONOQ、ARSEL和E2C的监管细节在公开英文来源中有限——独立核实至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] ARSEL許可和E2C併網批准是監管門檻，任何中國GB/T產品證書均無法滿足——須單獨提交行政申請。來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島證據是捐助方/貸款方項目的要求，也強烈建議所有併網裝置準備。在將設備用於項目前，請聘請剛果（布）當地顧問核實現行ARSEL許可要求和E2C技術併網條件。ACONOQ、ARSEL和E2C的監管細節在公開英文來源中有限——獨立核實至關重要。

requirement_topic.en: Donor/Lender Technical Specifications — World Bank and AfDB Solar PV Project Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 捐助方/贷款方技术规格——世界银行及非洲开发银行太阳能光伏项目要求
requirement_topic.zht: 捐助方/貸款方技術規格——世界銀行及非洲開發銀行太陽能光伏項目要求

summary.en: A significant share of solar PV projects in Congo-Brazzaville are funded or co-financed by multilateral development banks, including the World Bank (IDA/IBRD) and the African Development Bank (AfDB). These lenders impose technical specifications through procurement documents (request for proposals, technical specifications, bidding documents) that typically require: (a) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories; (b) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test evidence; (c) IEC 61727 grid interface compliance; (d) IEC 62920 EMC evidence; (e) product warranties and after-sales service commitments appropriate for equatorial conditions; (f) IP54 or higher ingress protection rating given Congo-Brazzaville's equatorial humidity. World Bank and AfDB procurement guidelines generally apply IEC standards and do not accept Chinese domestic GB/T certificates as substitutes without supplementary IEC evidence. Equatorial climate derating (high humidity, high ambient temperature, UV exposure) must be addressed in equipment technical submittals.
summary.zh: 刚果（布）相当比例的太阳能光伏项目由多边开发银行资助或联合融资，包括世界银行（IDA/IBRD）和非洲开发银行（非行）。这些贷款方通过采购文件（建议邀请书、技术规格、招标文件）提出技术规格，通常要求：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证书；（b）IEC 62116防孤岛测试证据；（c）IEC 61727并网接口合规；（d）IEC 62920 EMC证据；（e）适合赤道条件的产品保修和售后服务承诺；（f）鉴于刚果（布）赤道高湿，防护等级须达IP54或更高。世界银行和非行采购指南通常引用IEC标准，不接受中国国内GB/T证书作为替代，除非补充IEC证据。设备技术提交材料须包含赤道气候降额内容（高湿度、高环境温度、紫外线暴露）。
summary.zht: 剛果（布）相當比例的太陽能光伏項目由多邊開發銀行資助或聯合融資，包括世界銀行（IDA/IBRD）和非洲開發銀行（非行）。這些貸款方通過採購文件（建議邀請書、技術規格、招標文件）提出技術規格，通常要求：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證書；（b）IEC 62116防孤島測試證據；（c）IEC 61727併網接口合規；（d）IEC 62920 EMC證據；（e）適合赤道條件的產品保修和售後服務承諾；（f）鑑於剛果（布）赤道高濕，防護等級須達IP54或更高。世界銀行和非行採購指南通常引用IEC標準，不接受中國國內GB/T證書作為替代，除非補充IEC證據。設備技術提交材料須包含赤道氣候降額內容（高濕度、高環境溫度、紫外線暴露）。

standards_or_laws: World Bank Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers (applicable to IDA/IBRD-financed projects in Congo-Brazzaville)
African Development Bank (AfDB) Procurement Policy Framework (applicable to AfDB-financed projects)
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (typically required by donor/lender technical specifications)
IEC 62116 — Anti-islanding test procedure (typically required by donor/lender technical specifications)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
IEC 62920 — EMC requirements and test methods for PV power conversion equipment

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter manufacturers typically hold GB/T 37408-2021 voluntary certification and may hold NB/T 32004 compliance evidence. Some leading Chinese manufacturers also hold IEC 62109-1/-2 certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories, which would satisfy donor/lender requirements; however, this must be verified at the individual model level. GB/T 37408 alone does not satisfy World Bank or AfDB procurement technical specifications for PV inverters. Manufacturers bidding on donor/lender-financed Congo-Brazzaville projects must present IEC-based test evidence, not Chinese-only certificates.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器制造商通常持有GB/T 37408-2021自愿性认证，可能还持有NB/T 32004合规证据。部分领先中国制造商还持有来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2证书，可满足捐助方/贷款方要求；但须在单个型号层面核实。仅凭GB/T 37408不能满足世界银行或非行光伏逆变器采购技术规格。参与刚果（布）捐助方/贷款方资助项目投标的制造商须提交基于IEC的测试证据，不能仅凭中国证书。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器製造商通常持有GB/T 37408-2021自願性認證，可能還持有NB/T 32004合規證據。部分領先中國製造商還持有來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2證書，可滿足捐助方/貸款方要求；但須在單個型號層面核實。僅憑GB/T 37408不能滿足世界銀行或非行光伏逆變器採購技術規格。參與剛果（布）捐助方/貸款方資助項目投標的製造商須提交基於IEC的測試證據，不能僅憑中國證書。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese domestic certificates (GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004) do not satisfy World Bank or AfDB procurement technical specifications for solar PV inverters on donor-financed Congo-Brazzaville projects. Exporters bidding on such projects must present: (a) IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from ILAC-accredited laboratories for the specific model; (b) IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence; (c) IEC 62920 EMC evidence; (d) equatorial climate derating data and IP rating documentation. Confirm the applicable procurement framework (World Bank vs. AfDB vs. bilateral donor) and the specific technical specification annex of the project's bidding documents, as requirements vary by lender and project.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内证书（GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004）不满足世界银行或非行对捐助方资助刚果（布）项目的太阳能光伏逆变器采购技术规格。参与此类项目投标的出口商须提交：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、针对特定型号的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书；（b）IEC 62116防孤岛证据；（c）IEC 62920 EMC证据；（d）赤道气候降额数据和防护等级文件。请确认适用的采购框架（世界银行、非行或双边捐助方）及项目招标文件的具体技术规格附件，因不同贷款方和项目的要求有所不同。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內證書（GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004）不滿足世界銀行或非行對捐助方資助剛果（布）項目的太陽能光伏逆變器採購技術規格。參與此類項目投標的出口商須提交：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、針對特定型號的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書；（b）IEC 62116防孤島證據；（c）IEC 62920 EMC證據；（d）赤道氣候降額數據和防護等級文件。請確認適用的採購框架（世界銀行、非行或雙邊捐助方）及項目招標文件的具體技術規格附件，因不同貸款方和項目的要求有所不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for World Bank and AfDB-financed projects in Congo-Brazzaville — IEC-based evidence is a bidding requirement; voluntary for purely private-sector projects not subject to donor procurement rules
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese domestic certificates are issued under Chinese voluntary or recommended standards frameworks and do not confer compliance with donor/lender IEC-based procurement specifications

source.publisher: World Bank — Procurement Regulations for IPF Borrowers

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For donor/lender-financed solar PV projects in Congo-Brazzaville, Chinese GB/T certificates alone will not satisfy procurement technical specifications. Confirm the specific technical specification annex of the project's bidding documents and prepare IEC 62109-1/-2, IEC 62116, and IEC 62920 evidence from ILAC-accredited laboratories for the specific inverter model before bid submission. Include equatorial climate derating data (high humidity, ambient temperature, UV) in the technical submittal.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于刚果（布）捐助方/贷款方资助的太阳能光伏项目，仅凭中国GB/T证书不能满足采购技术规格。请在投标前确认项目招标文件的具体技术规格附件，并为特定逆变器型号从ILAC认可实验室准备IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116和IEC 62920证据。技术提交材料中须包含赤道气候降额数据（高湿度、环境温度、紫外线）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於剛果（布）捐助方/貸款方資助的太陽能光伏項目，僅憑中國GB/T證書不能滿足採購技術規格。請在投標前確認項目招標文件的具體技術規格附件，並為特定逆變器型號從ILAC認可實驗室準備IEC 62109-1/-2、IEC 62116和IEC 62920證據。技術提交材料中須包含赤道氣候降額數據（高濕度、環境溫度、紫外線）。
